texto: Had there been a computer a hundred years ago it would probably have predicted that by now there would be so many horse-drawn vehicles it would be impossible to clear up all the manure.
explicacao: Citação de K. William Kapp sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Had there been a computer a hundred years ago it would probably have predicted that by now there …” articula reflexao, capitalism, would em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
